allow: PowerShell(git commit -m "Initial commit: Long Run Agent Lab \(pre UI redesign\)")

PowerShell(New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force D:\\OneDrive\\Documents\\Proyectos\\LongRunAgent_Lab\\backend\\data\\tsplib | Out-Null; $names = @\("eil51","berlin52","st70","eil76","pr76","rat99","kroA100","kroB100","rd100","eil101","lin105","ch130","ch150","kroA150","rat195","d198","kroA200"\); $ok=@\(\); $fail=@\(\); foreach \($n in $names\) { try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mastqe/tsplib/master/$n.tsp" -OutFile "D:\\OneDrive\\Documents\\Proyectos\\LongRunAgent_Lab\\backend\\data\\tsplib\\$n.tsp" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; $ok += $n } catch { $fail += $n } }; "ok: $\($ok -join ', '\)"; "fail: $\($fail -join ', '\)")
Bash(python -c "import json,collections; c=collections.Counter\(json.loads\(l\)['type'] for l in open\('events.jsonl',encoding='utf-8'\)\); [print\(f'{v:3d}  {k}'\) for k,v in c.most_common\(\)]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('RUN_ID', d['id'], 'status', d['status']\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r['id'], r['status']\) for r in d[:4]]")
